drivers.notes: Vented; Hybrid Cross-Section Expanded Tractrix horn

description.en: Flagship of the Reference Premiere II floorstander line — 1" titanium LTS tweeter in a Hybrid Cross-Section Tractrix horn paired with twin 8" Cerametallic woofers with Faraday rings, in an internally-braced MDF cabinet with dual rear Tractrix ports. 98 dB sensitivity and 600 W peak.
description.es: Insignia entre los floorstanders de la línea Reference Premiere II — tweeter LTS de titanio de 1" en horn Tractrix Hybrid Cross-Section junto a dos woofers Cerametallic de 8" con anillos Faraday, en un gabinete MDF reforzado con doble puerto trasero Tractrix. 98 dB de sensibilidad y 600 W de pico.
